title: The Future of the characters after 3010
display_title: The Future of the characters after 3010
wikitext:
[]: The Future of the characters after 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by FXArmaros98 » Thu Dec 09, 2021 5:45 pm Hello everybody I decided to open this thread because this interview of Miyamura has caught my interest: However, at the stage greeting this time around - when Ogata talked about one more Shinji who remains behind after having sent off everyone - the feeling "I want him to go meet the adult Asuka!" grew stronger too." I think that Shinji also almost certainly meet the adult Asuka, meet Yui, and various other people but I definitely want the fans to complete the rest of the story." My two sources for the Miyamura's interview : https://evangelion.fandom.com/wiki/Evan ... imateTimes https://www.animatetimes.com/news/detai ... 1617977506 I thought that Yui, Gendo, Kaji and Misato would not be part of the new world because they were definitely dead but instead the Asuka's voice actress mentioned Yui practically said that she believe that maybe there could be a possibility that in addition to Kaworu and Rei other dead characters can be reborn in the new world. So I ask you to help me indulge Miyamura's desire for fans to end the story by giving me your opinion on this question I've been asking myself since I read her interview. You believe that this can realy happened? If is yes Gendo, Yui, Kaji and Misato will remember Shinji and what happened to them before their death? For you what will Shinji and the other characters do if they meet again? I would like to know your opinion on this and discuss together about it. PS : @ A heartfelt thanks to the members members of Eva Geeks that are give their time for work on the trasnlations

[]: Re: The Future of the characters after 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by dzzthink » Thu Dec 09, 2021 8:15 pm Where was this interview from? Its a nice interpretation of the ending but how kosher is it? Personally, I'd like to hear more opinions of the ending from the cast and crew on what the ending means. The characters might go for a ramen or Korean barbeque ( https://www.reddit.com/r/evangelion/com ... ritsukuri/ )

[]: Re: The Future of the characters after 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by FXArmaros98 » Fri Dec 10, 2021 5:00 am @ dzzthink I found this interview translated into a page of the Neon Genesis Evangelion Wiki,they has citing AnimateTimes as a source for the interview of Miyamura, I have modified my previous post by adding the links of my sources. If you want know the opinions of the other members of the cast follow then use this link: https://evangelion.fandom.com/wiki/Evan ... anslations . We should thanks Pluto, and others members of the Evageeks for the translations.

I think that Shinji also almost certainly meet the adult Asuka, meet Yui, and various other people but I definitely want the fans to complete the rest of the story." My two sources for the Miyamura's interview : https://evangelion.fandom.com/wiki/Evan ... imateTimes https://www.animatetimes.com/news/detai ... 1617977506 I thought that Yui, Gendo, Kaji and Misato would not be part of the new world because they were definitely dead but instead the Asuka's voice actress mentioned Yui practically said that she believe that maybe there could be a possibility that in addition to Kaworu and Rei other dead characters can be reborn in the new world. So I ask you to help me indulge Miyamura's desire for fans to end the story by giving me your opinion on this question I've been asking myself since I read her interview. You believe that this can realy happened? If is yes Gendo, Yui, Kaji and Misato will remember Shinji and what happened to them before their death?
